'''Bek Nataal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. He was responsible for saving [[Tere Metallo]] from [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] and was killed during an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] inspection a few [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later.

{{Char-stub}}
